item.title:

item.title: RT @AnthropicAI: We’re partnering with the Gates Foundation, committing $200 million in grants, Claude credits, and technical support to pr…
item.description: RT @AnthropicAI: We’re partnering with the Gates Foundation, committing $200 million in grants, Claude credits, and technical support to pr…

item.title: We're launching a huge SDK credit simplification on June 15: * Agent SDK/-p draws from a new bucket instead of your interactive limits (which stay exactly the same) * Every plan comes with $20-$200 of
item.description: We're launching a huge SDK credit simplification on June 15: * Agent SDK/-p draws from a new bucket instead of your interactive limits (which stay exactly the same) * Every plan comes with $20-$200 of monthly SDK credits * You can use 3P tools like T3/OC with these credits

item.title: RT @ClaudeDevs: How do you keep Claude working until the job is done? Claude Code helps with this in a few ways, including one we shipped r…

item.title:
This was a very special day. As always, grateful to be a part of this magic and build products that help you be a technical wiz, artist, designer, data analyst and more all rolled into one.
Also my
item.description:
This was a very special day. As always, grateful to be a part of this magic and build products that help you be a technical wiz, artist, designer, data analyst and more all rolled into one.
Also my ~6 month Antiversary
To six more months of making magic <3 https://t.co/Bf4qZuWaZ2

item.title:
Agent SDK 🤝 Your design system
"The design system is generated in an autonomous run averaging 53 minutes. Then, any team member can prompt Bolt to produce on-brand prototypes, generating code that c
item.description:
Agent SDK 🤝 Your design system
"The design system is generated in an autonomous run averaging 53 minutes. Then, any team member can prompt Bolt to produce on-brand prototypes, generating code that can go to production with minimal rework." https://t.co/kwUjrwXIOR
